text:
Once upon a time, there was a curious cat named Whiskers.

Whiskers lived in an old barn surrounded by haystacks. Every morning he'd swoop out onto the threshing floor. One morning he noticed something strange flying across.

Mustaches!

It grew bigger. It was zebras!

They chased each other around. Zebras tried to bite. Whiskers dodged gracefully. When they flew closer he grabbed some stripes.

An eagle swooped down!

Whiskers ran. They soared. His stripes were feathers.

Birdsong!

They landed back. That night he counted their babies.

Twelve stripes.


That's how I know.

Then one day he found a moonstone.

Moonshine?

Maybe.

He blinked. Stars.

He wondered. What?

There on moonbeams?

Perhaps.

Whiskers curled.

The moon smiled.

Night fell.

That's eternal.

It's the story.

I like it.

You think?

Maybe.

Tomorrow?

That's a
